name: CollabHub_SyncPlannerToSharePoint
description: Two-way sync between Planner and SharePoint Tasks (runs every 15 min)

Planner_to_SharePoint: 1. Get all Planner tasks from Plan
2. For each task, find matching SharePoint item by PlannerTaskId
SharePoint_to_Planner: 1. Get recently modified SharePoint tasks (last 20 min)
2. For each task with PlannerTaskId, get Planner task
